title: phyllanthus senaei
intro: Phyllanthus senaei, also known as Phyllanthus niruri, is a tropical plant species commonly found in Southeast Asia and India, belonging to the family Phyllanthaceae. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, including its ability to stimulate liver function, reduce inflammation, and exhibit antimicrobial and antiviral properties. The health benefits of Phyllanthus senaei include its potential to support liver health, reduce fever, and alleviate symptoms of various diseases, such as hepatitis and jaundice. Phyllanthus senaei is often prepared as a decoction, infusion, or tincture, and its herbal preparations can be consumed as a tea or added to food products for its medicinal benefits.
